title: clerodendrum bellum
intro: Clerodendrum bellum, also known as the glory bower, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum bellum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to alleviate fever and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum bellum are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
